savingsTips.title: Simple ways to lower your bill
savingsTips.subtitle: Australian households can save hundreds each year with a few easy changes.

tips.title: Shift to off-peak
tips.description: Run your dishwasher, washing machine, and dryer during off-peak hours. Most networks charge less between 10pm and 7am.

tips.title: Optimise your air con
tips.description: Set your air conditioner to 24-26°C in summer. Each degree cooler adds about 10% to your cooling costs.

tips.title: Switch to LED lighting
tips.description: LED bulbs use up to 80% less energy than halogen downlights and last up to 25 times longer.

tips.title: Track with My Account
tips.description: Use My Account to see your daily usage and get personalised tips to save.

testimonials.title: What our customers say
testimonials.subtitle: Join 1.6 million Australians making smarter energy choices.

items.name: Sarah M.
items.quote: Switching was incredibly easy. I'm saving around 15% compared to my old provider, and I love that my plan is carbon neutral.

items.name: James R.
items.quote: The app is brilliant. I can see exactly when I'm using the most energy and shift things to off-peak. My bills have dropped noticeably.

items.name: Lisa T.
items.quote: The solar and battery bundle was exactly what we needed. Installation was smooth and we're already seeing savings on our quarterly bill.

cta.title: Ready to make the switch?
cta.subtitle: Join 1.6 million Australians who trust EnergyAustralia. Switching is quick and easy.
